name: grid_demand_forecast
description: Weekly electricity grid demand forecasting using weather, calendar and market data

columns.name: timestamp_week
columns.description: Monday marking the start of the measurement week

columns.name: demand_mwh
columns.description: Total electricity consumed across the grid during the week in megawatt-hours

columns.name: peak_demand_mw
columns.description: Maximum instantaneous load recorded on the grid during the week in megawatts

columns.name: mean_temp_c
columns.description: Weekly mean outdoor temperature in degrees Celsius

columns.name: wind_avg_ms
columns.description: Weekly average wind speed in metres per second

columns.name: public_holidays
columns.description: Number of public holidays falling within the week

columns.name: renewable_share_pct
columns.description: Share of renewable energy in total generation during the week, as a percentage
